mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login_id, password, email, nickname, provider, provider_id) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{provider}, #{providerId})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, login_id, password, email, nickname, provider, provider_id FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, login_id, password, email, nickname, provider, provider_id FROM users WHERE user_id = #{id} LIMIT 1
